message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker with dependency edges and status refreshes

Sync .beads/issues.jsonl with latest dependency graph imports and
status updates across the tracked issue set. Dependency edges now
include cross-references between blocking/blocked issues for the
Sobol scheduler, conformance pipeline, and ABI nativization tasks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
